summary: Auth core and middleware ordering are exemplary. Top risks: payment webhook fail-open misconfig (critical), serial N+1 weekly digest (critical), and a systemic controller try/catch anti-pattern that bypasses errorMiddleware and leaks raw err.message in production.

findings.title: Payment webhook auth FAIL-OPEN when secret env missing
findings.fix: Return false (deny) unconditionally when secret unset; add boot-time fail-fast in prod.

findings.title: Weekly digest N+1 + fully serial broadcast + full UserStats scan
findings.fix: Batch nextCourse via aggregation per 100-user slice; p-limit(5) sends; restrict rankMap to xp>0 with {xp:-1} index.

findings.title: Controller-local try/catch bypasses errorMiddleware, leaks raw err.message (174 blocks, 23 controllers)
findings.fix: Wrap all controllers in asyncHandler + next(err); remove local try/catch.

findings.title: validateObjectId missing on many routes + only checks req.params.id (breaks :courseId/:videoId/:userId)
findings.fix: Make parametric: (param='id')=>...; apply on all :id routes; return {success:false}.

findings.title: Payment credential/signature compared with non-constant-time ===
findings.fix: Use crypto.timingSafeEqual / safeEqual over equal-length buffers.

findings.title: Promo usedCount never incremented -> maxUses bypass (unlimited use)
findings.fix: Atomic findOneAndUpdate with $expr $lt guard + $inc usedCount on payment success.

findings.title: JSON-LD dangerouslySetInnerHTML </script> breakout (stored XSS via user bio)
findings.fix: Escape JSON.stringify output: replace < > & with \u003c \u003e \u0026 across all JSON-LD blocks.

findings.title: CSP is Report-Only and allows unsafe-inline -> no enforced XSS protection
findings.fix: Switch to enforcing Content-Security-Policy; replace unsafe-inline with per-request nonce.

findings.title: register thunk dead auto-login branch can set isLoggedIn=true with undefined user
findings.fix: Guard data?.data?.user; route register through shared fulfilled reducer; remove dead branch.

findings.title: Unbounded embedded arrays: Prompt.likes, User.knownDevices, Enrollment.watchedVideos
findings.fix: Move likes to PromptLike collection (unique {promptId,userId}); cap knownDevices via $slice; $addToSet watchedVideos.

findings.title: providerTransactionId/clickTransId lack unique constraint (webhook-replay double-credit)
findings.fix: {provider, providerTransactionId} compound unique:true sparse:true.

findings.title: providerResponse/providerData Mixed stored unsanitized (prototype pollution)
findings.fix: Pluck needed fields or JSON.parse(JSON.stringify()) before storing.

findings.title: XP->rank tier logic duplicated across 6+ modules
findings.fix: Single utils/rank.js, import everywhere.

findings.title: No service layer + god controllers (telegramBot 1489, adminController 590, videoController 700)
findings.fix: Introduce services/ layer; split Q&A and challenge/stats admin out.

findings.title: getTopUsers missing .lean(), unindexed rank countDocuments, sequential count+find
findings.fix: .lean() on read-only queries; {xp:-1}/{weeklyXp:-1} indexes; Promise.all count+find.

findings.title: Synchronous fs read-modify-write per post blocks event loop
findings.fix: fs.promises + in-memory Set + debounced flush, or DB/Redis dedupe state.

findings.title: Inconsistent pagination envelopes + getPrompts/getAllCourses unbounded limit
findings.fix: Shared pagination helper; clamp limit Math.min(50,...) and page Math.max(1,...).

findings.title: reorderVideos: up to 500 individual findByIdAndUpdate, non-atomic
findings.fix: Video.bulkWrite([...updateOne...]).

findings.title: continueLearning: Video.findOne inside enrollment loop (N+1)
findings.fix: Promise.all fan-out + {course:1,isActive:1,order:1} index.

findings.title: Scheduler/bot/email require() lazy inside connectDB().then() (circular-dep signal, not fail-fast)
findings.fix: Top-level require; keep only start*() inside connectDB().then().

findings.title: Promo discount never applied server-side; validate route unwired
PRO grant only amount/category based, perpetual (expiresAt:null), not idempotent
Payme order_id invalid ObjectId -> CastError not spec -31050
Click amount unit (UZS vs tiyin) mismatch risk with Payme
enrollCourse race: studentsCount may double-increment
express-mongo-sanitize does not cover req.query (NoSQL injection vector)
No source-IP allowlist on payment webhooks
Backend CSP allows unsafe-eval app-wide (Swagger)
Double view-count increment (GET /:id + POST /:id/view)
JSDoc @access Public contradicts route auth/Telegram gating
submitQuiz does not validate answers[] shape -> 500
create/updateCourse mass-assignment of derived stats (rating/studentsCount)
likePrompt read-modify-write -> lost-update race
Course title/description no maxlength (unbounded string)
Prompt.tags / UserStats.skills array length uncapped
No cascade/orphan protection on Course/User delete
Denormalized counters drift risk + no min:0
telegramUserId not indexed (bot lookup full-scan)
Multiple admin/ranking reads missing .lean()
Rank via unindexed countDocuments({xp:$gt})
markVideoWatched loads full Course.videos per watch
No /api/v1 versioning
Hardcoded admin Telegram ID 697727022 fallback x15
ProtectedRoute writes ?next= but LoginForm ignores it (dead; validate if wired)
Client-only route guard — relies on backend requireAdmin
TMA effect re-runs full async body on isLoggedIn change
Pervasive any + @ts-nocheck on route guards (root enabler of W-7)
checkAuthStatus gates /auth/me on client localStorage cache (cookie is authoritative)
